title: acalypha parvula var. reniformis
intro: Acalypha parvula var. reniformis, also known as the Reniform Acalypha or Small Leaved Copper Leaf, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, characterized by its small leaves and copper-colored stems. The medicinal properties of Acalypha parvula var. reniformis include its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, as well as its use in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of this plant include its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Acalypha parvula var. reniformis is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in herbal remedies such as salves and ointments.
